tool: Siril 1.4.4 register (2-pass) regdata via scripts/qa/inspect_stage.py; flagged by scripts/qa/cull_report.py
method: 304 NEF -> CFA FITS (undebayered) -> register -2pass in 4 batches of 76; per-frame FWHM/roundness/background/#stars pooled (reference-independent metrics; wfwhm advisory only). Same method as set-01's record so the two sets compare; CFA caveat carries: absolute FWHM Bayer-inflated, relative comparison only.

flagged_defect_side_z3p5.note: start of a 5-frame thin-cloud/haze dwell (bg +3.3-3.7 sigma, nstars -3.4-3.9 sigma, FWHM normal)
single-frame elongation blip (round z 5.75) — wind/bump class
fwhm z +6.05, nstars z -5.87, roundness 16 sigma HIGH; also carries a 583 px satellite streak (audit)

anomaly_summary: 44 satellites across 39 frames + 2 AIRCRAFT (DSC_7574/7575, parallel twin trails ~17 px apart, conf 0.9); bookends: DSC_7272 satellite 174 px, DSC_7575 aircraft (audit_work/anomaly_audit.json)

cull_candidate.policy: 7272 session-first + satellite (edge rule); 7574/7575 aircraft (policy) with 7575 also session-last; 7573 double-axis QA flag (fwhm +6, nstars -5.9) + 583 px streak. 7551-7555 (5-frame thin-cloud dwell) and 7569 (single-axis blip) proposed KEEP — minority transients stack clean through rej 3 3; listed for the user's call.

assessment: Clean, stable ~35-min run: 304/304 registered, FWHM spread tiny (median 3.633, max 3.723), roundness uniform 0.615 (the fixed-tripod in-exposure floor), background flat outside one 5-frame haze dwell near session end. The session tail carries all the events: the haze dwell, one elongation blip, and the 7573-7575 streak/aircraft finish.
